mods.name: Cold Air Intake
mods.description: Replace the restrictive stock airbox with a high-flow cone filter intake for improved throttle response and a more aggressive induction sound.
mods.installNotes: 30 minute install. Remove stock airbox, connect MAF sensor to new intake pipe. Ensure no vacuum leaks.

mods.name: Performance Exhaust System
mods.description: A cat-back exhaust system reduces backpressure and gives the M54 inline-6 a deeper, more refined exhaust note without drone at highway speeds.
mods.installNotes: Bolt-on replacement from the catalytic converter back. Two-piece design hangs from factory rubber mounts.

mods.name: Lowering Springs
mods.description: Drop the ride height 1–1.5 inches for improved handling and a more aggressive stance while retaining stock dampers for daily comfort.
mods.installNotes: Requires spring compressor. Replace all four corners at once. Re-align after install. Expect 30–40mm drop.

mods.name: Performance Coilovers
mods.description: Fully adjustable coilover suspension allows precise ride height and damping settings for street or track use, transforming the E46 chassis.
mods.partNumbers: BC Racing BR Series, KW V3 35220004
mods.installNotes: Full strut assembly replacement. Set initial height at 25mm drop all around. Adjust damping 8 clicks from full stiff for street use. Corner balance and alignment required.

mods.name: ECU Tune (Software Flash)
mods.description: Reflash the DME to optimize fueling, ignition timing, and remove the speed limiter. Gains of 10–15hp on the M54 with improved throttle mapping.
mods.partNumbers: Turner Motorsport Conforti Tune, Shark Injector SI-002
mods.installNotes: Connect OBD-II cable and flash via laptop. Takes 15 minutes. Requires 91+ octane fuel after tune. Save stock map first.

mods.name: Performance Headers
mods.description: Long-tube headers replace the restrictive factory exhaust manifold for significant mid-range and top-end power gains on the naturally aspirated inline-6.
mods.installNotes: Remove factory manifold and catalytic converter. Installation from below is easier on a lift. May require O2 sensor extensions. Expect 12–18hp gain with supporting mods.

mods.name: Limited Slip Differential
mods.description: Replace the open differential with an LSD for drastically improved traction out of corners and more predictable oversteer characteristics on track.
mods.installNotes: Requires dropping the subframe or removing the differential housing. Set preload to factory spec. Refill with GL-5 75W-90 gear oil.

mods.name: S54 Engine Swap
mods.description: Swap in the 333hp S54 engine from the E46 M3 for a massive power upgrade while retaining factory-like reliability and drivability.
mods.partNumbers: S54B32 engine assembly, M3 wiring harness, M3 ECU (Siemens MS S54)
mods.installNotes: Requires engine, transmission, driveshaft, wiring harness, ECU, and exhaust from donor M3. Subframe and engine mounts are shared. Budget 40+ hours for a clean swap including wiring integration.
